message:
fix(lint+safety): fix empty-shard division guards and formatting in 3 modules

Guard against division by zero in sharding.rs when shard_ids is empty
or backends list is empty. Add test coverage for empty shard edge case.
Apply line-wrapping formatting to work_stealing_deque.rs and
vendored_migration_map.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
